metadata.title: Marble AI - AI Video Generator
metadata.description: Transform your ideas into stunning videos with Marble AI's Video Generator. Powered by leading AI models including Seedance, Kling, Wan, Sora, Veo, and more. Support text-to-video, image-to-video, and video-to-video.

hero.title: AI Video Generator
hero.description: Unleash your creativity with Marble AI. Generate stunning, high-quality videos from text, images, or existing videos using the world's most advanced AI models.

introduce.title: Powered by Leading AI Models
introduce.label: AI Models
introduce.description: Marble AI integrates the most powerful video generation AI models, giving you access to cutting-edge text-to-video, image-to-video, and video-to-video technology in one platform.

items.title: ByteDance
items.description: ByteDance's Seedance series delivers powerful video generation models with multimodal capabilities, cinematic quality, and synchronized audio.

items.title: Kling
items.description: Kling AI's video generation models excel at multi-shot storytelling, realistic motion, and native audio synchronization.

items.title: OpenAI
items.description: OpenAI's Sora series delivers cutting-edge video generation with realistic motion, physics consistency, and cinematic control.

items.title: Google
items.description: Google DeepMind's Veo series offers next-generation AI video generation with high-fidelity visuals and advanced scene understanding.

items.title: Wan
items.description: Alibaba's Wan models provide affordable multi-shot 1080p generation with stable characters and synchronized native audio.

items.title: Hailuo
items.description: MiniMax's Hailuo models create high-fidelity videos with realistic motion, expressive characters, and cinematic visuals.

items.title: Grok (xAI)
items.description: xAI's multimodal video generation model with coherent motion and synchronized audio capabilities.

items.title: Runway
items.description: Runway AI's Gen-4 architecture powers groundbreaking video generation from text, images, and scene editing.

model.title: Explore Our AI Video Models
model.description: Choose from the world's most advanced video generation models, each with unique strengths for different creative needs.

items.title: Seedance 2.0
items.description: Seedance 2.0 is a multimodal AI video model by ByteDance that generates consistent, cinematic videos with strong multi-shot consistency and native audio using text, image, video, and audio references.

items.title: Kling 3.0
items.description: Kling 3.0 is Kling AI's video generation model that creates videos from text and images, supports multi-shot storytelling, and produces native audio with cinematic control up to 15 seconds.

items.title: Seedance 1.5 Pro
items.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro is ByteDance's audio-video generation model that creates cinema-quality video, synchronized audio, and multilingual dialogue with cinematic camera control.

items.title: Wan 2.6
items.description: Wan 2.6 is Alibaba's latest AI video model, offering affordable multi-shot 1080p generation with stable characters and synchronized native audio. Through the Wan 2.6 API—including T2V, I2V, and reference-guided modes—you can create up to 15-second cinematic videos with improved motion logic, consistent visuals, and production-ready quality.

items.title: Kling 2.6
items.description: Kling 2.6 is Kling AI's audio-visual generation model that produces synchronized video, speech, ambient sound, and sound effects from text or image inputs.

items.title: Grok Imagine
items.description: Grok Imagine is xAI's multimodal image and video generation model that converts text or images into short visual outputs with coherent motion and synchronized audio.

items.title: Hailuo 2.3
items.description: Hailuo 2.3 is MiniMax's high-fidelity AI video generation model designed to create realistic motion, expressive characters, and cinematic visuals. It supports both text-to-video and image-to-video, handling complex movements, lighting changes, and detailed facial expressions with stability and consistency.

items.title: Sora 2 Pro Storyboard
items.description: OpenAI's advanced AI video model for structured video generation, supporting multi-scene sequencing, visual consistency, and 25-second output control.

items.title: Veo 3.1
items.description: Google DeepMind's upgraded AI video model for realistic motion generation, extended clip duration, multi-image reference control, and synchronized audio output in native 1080p.

items.title: Sora 2 Pro
items.description: An upgraded version of OpenAI's Sora 2 model, delivering more realistic motion, refined physics, and synchronized native audio, with text-to-video and image-to-video generation up to 15 seconds in 1080p HD.

items.title: Veo 3
items.description: Google Veo 3 is a next-generation AI video generation model developed by Google DeepMind. It supports both text-to-video and image-to-video creation, producing high-fidelity, cinematic visuals with advanced scene understanding and natural motion simulation. Through Kie.ai, users can access Veo 3 Fast for rapid, cost-efficient workflows or Veo 3 Quality for premium output, all with transparent pricing and stable infrastructure.

items.title: Sora 2
items.description: Sora 2 is OpenAI's latest AI video generation model, supporting both text-to-video and image-to-video. It delivers realistic motion, physics consistency, with improved control over style, scene, and aspect ratio—ideal for creative apps and social media content.

items.title: Kling 2.5 Turbo
items.description: Kling 2.5 Turbo is the latest AI video generation model from Kuaishou Kling, designed for text-to-video and image-to-video creation. Compared to earlier versions, it features better prompt adherence, more fluid motion, consistent artistic styles, and realistic physics simulation.

items.title: Wan 2.5
items.description: Wan 2.5 API from Alibaba is designed for cinematic AI video generation, supporting both text-to-video (wan2.5-t2v-preview) and image-to-video (wan2.5-i2v-preview). It natively synchronizes visuals with dialogue, ambient sound, and background music. With support for multiple resolutions (720p, 1080p) and aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1), the API delivers flexible outputs suitable for social media, advertising, and creative storytelling.

items.title: Hailuo 02
items.description: Hailuo 02 API is Minimax's advanced AI video generation model that turns text or images into short, cinematic clips. It supports high-quality output up to 1080P, with realistic motion, physics simulation, and precise camera control.

items.title: Runway Video Generation
items.description: Step into the future of content creation with the Runway API, powered by Runway AI's groundbreaking Gen-4 architecture. Available exclusively through Kie.ai, this toolkit transforms ideas into stunning videos using Runway Gen 4 Turbo API and Runway Aleph API. Whether you're generating from text, editing scenes, or converting images to dynamic footage, Runway AI image to video capabilities deliver professional results instantly.

items.title: Seedance V1
items.description: From Seeds of Ideas to Dancing Visuals: Seedance 1.0 API Brings Your Stories to Life

items.title: Kling V2.1
items.description: The Kling 2.1 model powers cutting-edge video generation with hyper-realistic motion, advanced physics, and high-resolution outputs up to 1080p. Its enhanced semantic understanding and fast rendering make it ideal for dynamic, professional-grade video creation.

items.title: Wan V2.2 A14B
items.description: Wan 2.2 A14B Turbo API, the latest generation of the Wan video model, is built with a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture and supports text-to-video (T2V), image-to-video (I2V) and speech-to-video(S2V). It delivers smooth 720p@24fps clips with cinematic quality, stable motion, and consistent visual style for diverse creative and commercial use cases.

items.title: Seedance 1.0 Pro Fast
items.description: ByteDance's AI video-generation model that inherits Seedance 1.0 Pro's core quality while delivering 3× faster rendering, producing coherent 1080p clips with stable motion and efficient compute performance.

items.title: Wan 2.2 Animate
items.description: Wan 2.2 Animate API by Alibaba's Tongyi Lab generates realistic character videos with motion, expressions, and lighting. It supports animation mode for driving static images and replacement mode for swapping characters into existing clips seamlessly.

items.title: Kling 3.0 Motion Control
items.description: Kling Motion Control 3.0 is Kuaishou Kling's AI video motion model that transfers movement from reference videos to character images while preserving facial identity, expressions, and realistic motion dynamics.

items.title: Kling 2.6 Motion Control
items.description: Developed by KuaiShou, Kling AI 2.6 Motion Control API is a performance-driven image-to-video model that transfers real human motion, gestures, and expressions from reference video to character images with stable timing and realism.

items.title: Topaz Video Upscaler
items.description: Topaz Video Upscaler API delivers professional-grade AI video enhancement, restoring detail, reducing noise, and providing high-quality upscaling to 1080p or 4K.

faq.title: FAQ - AI Video Generator
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Marble AI's Video Generator.

items.title: What is AI Video Generation?
items.description: AI Video Generation is an AI-powered technology that creates videos from text prompts, images, or existing videos. Simply provide your input, and Marble AI's advanced models will generate stunning videos for you.

items.question: What generation modes does Marble AI support?
items.answer: Marble AI supports three generation modes: Text-to-Video (create videos from text descriptions), Image-to-Video (animate static images into videos), and Video-to-Video (transform existing videos into new content). Each mode leverages different AI models optimized for specific use cases.

items.question: Which AI models does Marble AI support?
items.answer: Marble AI integrates the leading video generation models including Seedance 2.0 (ByteDance), Kling 3.0 (Kling), Wan 2.6 (Wan), Sora 2 Pro (OpenAI), Veo 3.1 (Google), Hailuo 2.3 (Hailuo), Grok Imagine (Grok), Runway Video Generation (Runway), and more. Each model has unique strengths, and you can choose the best one for your specific needs.

items.question: How do I use Marble AI's Video Generator?
items.answer: Simply choose your preferred generation mode (text-to-video, image-to-video, or video-to-video), provide your input (text prompt, image, or video), select your preferred AI model and style settings, and click generate. Our intuitive interface makes it easy for anyone to create professional-quality videos in seconds.

items.question: What video quality can I expect?
items.answer: Marble AI generates high-resolution videos up to 1080p quality. The exact output depends on the model you choose, but all our models are optimized for exceptional detail, color accuracy, and visual appeal.

items.question: Can I use generated videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes! All videos generated through Marble AI come with full commercial rights. You can use them for marketing, products, websites, social media, and any other business purposes without restrictions.

items.question: How fast is the video generation?
items.answer: Most videos are generated within seconds to minutes depending on the model and complexity. Our optimized infrastructure ensures you get your results quickly without compromising quality.

items.question: Can I customize the style of generated videos?
items.answer: Absolutely! Marble AI offers extensive customization options including style presets, aspect ratios, and advanced parameters. You have full control over the artistic direction of your videos.

cta.title: Ready to Create Amazing Videos?
cta.description: Start generating stunning videos with Marble AI's powerful Video Generator. Choose from text-to-video, image-to-video, or video-to-video modes.
